name: Trammell Love Law Firm
description_short: Nashville-based bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7, Chapter 13, foreclosure prevention, and business formation services with 15+ years of experience.
description_long:
Trammell Love Law Firm is a bankruptcy and legal services practice located in Nashville, Tennessee, that has been operating for more than 15 years. The firm positions itself as a compassionate, client-focused bankruptcy attorney practice serving the Nashville metropolitan area. According to their website, they have built a reputation for treating clients with care and providing in-depth legal assistance across multiple practice areas.

The firm offers bankruptcy filing services (Chapter 7 and Chapter 13), foreclosure prevention representation, loan modification assistance, business formation and LLC setup, personal injury consultation, probate services, wills and trusts, DUI defense, and conservatorship/guardianship services. They emphasize that all services are available electronically, allowing clients to avoid in-person office visits if preferred. They also advertise a free initial consultation to prospective clients.

The firm distinguishes itself through seven stated attributes: being dedicated, caring, focused, genuine, communicative, experienced, and knowledgeable. They specifically market themselves to homeowners facing foreclosure through Chapter 13 bankruptcy, and position Chapter 13 as a tool for foreclosure prevention. The practice appears to prioritize accessibility and client communication as core differentiators.

While the website provides general information about their services and experience level, it lacks specific case results, attorney credentials, bankruptcy filing statistics, or detailed testimonials. Potential clients should verify the firm's disciplinary history and attorney bar standing independently, as these details are not available on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 15+ years of established practice history in Nashville market
All services available electronically with no requirement for in-person meetings
Multiple practice areas beyond bankruptcy (business formation, loan modification, foreclosure prevention)
Specific marketing focus on foreclosure prevention through Chapter 13 bankruptcy
Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy expertise explicitly offered
cons: Website lacks specific attorney credentials, bar certifications, or published case results
No bankruptcy filing statistics, success rates, or case outcome data provided
Limited client testimonials or reviews visible on website
Broad practice areas across 11 different legal services may indicate generalist rather than specialist focus
No pricing information or fee structure disclosed on website
best_for: Nashville-area residents facing foreclosure seeking Chapter 13 bankruptcy protection
Individuals considering Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Tennessee with preference for remote service delivery
Small business owners needing both bankruptcy consultation and business formation services
Homeowners seeking loan modification assistance alongside bankruptcy consideration
diagnosis: Trammell Love Law Firm is best for Nashville-area consumers considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who value remote service delivery and prefer a practice emphasizing client communication. Primary caveat: the website provides limited objective evidence of bankruptcy-specific expertise, case outcomes, or attorney qualifications—independent verification of bar standing and disciplinary history is recommended before engagement.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
